title: senecio micranthus
intro: Senecio micranthus, also known as the Button Orchid or Cape Dendranthe, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio micranthus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Senecio micranthus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
